title: Still Life
description: Still Life replaces Minecraft’s default Overworld with a more realistic alternative!
body:
![warm_temperate_mountains](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/29cbd2c692d509c0bbe3489e95c9e3f4acb899a8_0.webp)


_Still Life is a full rework of the overworld dimension, with the aim of giving minecraft a more natural and realistic look!_



### Features 

**New biomes and better transitions**

All vanilla surface biomes have been replaced with more natural counterparts, along with many transitional biomes. 


**More detail per biome**

All biomes added by Still Life have a higher density of shrubs, flowers, and trees, while maintaining a simplistic appearance without any new blocks or items.


**More cave biomes**

You can expect to find varied and fantasy-based cave biomes, in contrast to the more realistic surface biomes.



### Installation


You need to have Lithosphere installed as a datapack or mod if you want to use Still Life.

Also, make sure that Still Life is loaded above Lithosphere in the "Data Packs" world settings!

![loading_order](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8d495cd9ea2dc6cef49b177cbac6eb5a26f46462.png)



### Compatability

- Still Life has build-in compatability for **Dungeons and Taverns** and **Towns and Towers**. 
- Still Life should not be used together with other biome datapacks or mods (such as Terralith or Biomes O’ Plenty).




### Known Issues 

Still Life is still in beta, so please report any bugs or issues on my Discord server!

- Worldgen performance can be very slow in some cases, be sure to install performance mods such as C2ME, Nvidium or Ferrite Core.
